_publications._publicationTitle: Spectrophotometric and computational characterization of charge transfer complex of selumetinib with 2,3-dichloro-5,6-dicyano-1,4-benzoquinone and its utilization in developing an innovative green and high throughput microwell assay for analysis of bulk form and pharmaceutical formulation.

_contextSnippet: The B3LYP/6-31G basis set which is a hybrid functional employed in density functional theory (DFT) calculations was employed. The optimized structures of molecules SEL, DDQ, and SEL-DDQ complex obtained with the B3LYP/6-31G level
details: Successfully performed DFT calculations using B3LYP/6-31G basis set to optimize molecular structures and determine bond lengths for SEL-DDQ complex characterization
